title: COMMUNITY HOMELESS REINTEGRATION SERVICES - 211info
text: PORTLAND VA MEDICAL CENTER HEALTH CARE SYSTEM COMMUNITY HOMELESS REINTEGRATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Community Reintegration Services (CRS) assist veterans who are homeless or at risk of homelessness in developing and maintaining the skills necessary to succeed in community living. Services include: -Vocational Services where veterans can access job search assistance, job coaching, educational guidance, and vocational skill-building resources -Community Shelter and Housing works with community providers to help homeless veterans find local shelters -Outreach to homeless veterans -Case Managed Housing maintains 160+ veterans in case-managed housing 3710 SW US Veterans Hospital Road Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Veterans who are homeless or at risk of homelessness Hours: Phone hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Walk-in housing program hours: Tuesday/Thursday 9am-3pm (503) 273-5187 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 220-8262 Main phone (503) 273-5187 Intake Mental Health Treatment (503) 220-8262 Ext: 31841 Intake Substance Abuse Treatment (800) 949-1004 Toll-free Main phone (503) 273-5187 Main phone (360) 696-4061 Vancouver Toll-free (800) 949-1004 ext 31330 Toll Free INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for appointment FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: DD214 or supporting documentation of military service LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Services: Street Outreach Programs * Homeless Veterans Transitional Housing/Shelter * Homeless Veterans Veteran Reintegration Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: INPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - VETERAN AND MILITARY HOSPITAL MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - VETERANS' JUSTICE OUTREACH PROGRAM MUTUAL SUPPORT - NATIVE AMERICAN SERVICES FOR VETERANS OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - WOMEN VETERANS HEALTH CARE SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PORTLAND VA MEDICAL CENTER HEALTH CARE SYSTEM
